text: Your sun signs might clash, but if your moon signs vibe? That's the person who'll actually get why you cry at dog videos and need exactly 20 minutes to decompress after work 🌙 Moon compatibility = emotional wavelength matches

Venus in fire signs show love through grand gestures and adventures. Venus in earth signs? They'll remember your coffee order and fix your broken shelf. Venus in air signs write you poems, while water signs just *know* when you need a hug 💕
Scorpio energy in dating hits different. Other signs are like "let's grab coffee sometime" while Scorpios are already planning which of your childhood traumas they want to help you heal first ♏

Scorpios don't do casual dating—they're either planning your spiritual awakening together or they've already decided you're not deep enough to handle their intensity. No middle ground, no surface level conversations ♏

Sun sign compatibility is like judging a book by its cover. Your Mercury might sync perfectly with their Venus while your Mars squares their Moon. Real astrology compatibility? It's messy, complex, and way more accurate ✨
Scorpios will meet you on Tuesday and by Friday they've already decided if you're marriage material or just another surface-level disappointment. Zero patience for small talk about the weather ♏
Libra is texting you back within 3 minutes or 3 business days—no in between. They're either completely obsessed or still weighing if you're worth disrupting their perfectly curated life ⚖️
Mercury retrograde means your ex will text you at 2am asking "you up?" while your current situationship suddenly can't figure out how phones work. Classic cosmic chaos ☿️
